name: Perpetual Limited
analysis: PPT has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 23% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. Volume is expanding (1.2× the 20-day average) — real participation. Trade idea: entry A$16.1300, stop A$14.9490, target A$18.0689 (1.64:1) — then trail it.
